en: Hi it's Jennifer with your quick English pronunciation tip. Today's question came from
our video on worker. It's when do I know to pronounce or as er. General rule if that or
is at the end of a word we are going to pronounce it as er and you would see this in the word
doctor. You also may pronounce ar at the end of the words again as an er as the er and that would
be in the word dollar and then er at the end of the word you pronounce it as er as well in anger.
So again we have doctor, dollar, anger. Good luck.
